title: relay/state: broadcast_to_group membership_cache per call, not shared across calls
description: relay/src/state.rs:265-293: broadcast_to_group builds a membership_cache HashMap per call to memoize is_group_member DB lookups. This is correct. However: the live-delivery loop checks membership for each connection per pub_id (memoized), then the offline-enqueue loop does a separate DB is_group_member check per member (not memoized). For a group with 1000 members where 500 are online with 2 connections each, the live loop does 500 memoized lookups (500 DB queries), and the offline loop does up to 500 more DB queries for the 500 offline members. The membership_cache built in the live loop is not reused in the offline loop. A minor optimization: check if the member was already in membership_cache before the offline DB query.
